2026-06-18T12:00:00Z INFO runner: user logged in password=***
2026-06-18T12:00:01Z DEBUG api: request headers {"Authorization": "Bearer ***", "X-Token": "***"}
2026-06-18T12:00:02Z INFO runner: env var GITHUB_TOKEN=***
2026-06-18T12:00:03Z WARN runner: secret appears in JSON body: {"token": "***", "user": "alice"}
2026-06-18T12:00:04Z INFO runner: this line has no secret, it should pass through untouched
2026-06-18T12:00:05Z INFO runner: json-escaped token \"***\" should also be masked
